plan_review_notes: Manual spec validation passed. The revised task spec is concrete enough to implement: it defines deterministic validation rules, lifecycle gates, persistence, CLI/MCP surfaces, compatibility constraints, ordering, and focused tests. Approving plan before spec freeze.

plan_review_history.notes: Generated plan is too generic for this prerequisite. Revise into a concrete spec-validation pipeline plan: validation stage, rule set, diagnostics, lifecycle integration points before approve/freeze, CLI/MCP surfaces, waiver model, and focused tests.

Revised the generated task docs into a concrete spec-validation pipeline plan covering deterministic rules, report persistence, plan/freeze/verify gates, CLI/MCP surfaces, compatibility constraints, and focused tests. Leaving the task pending review before implementation.

Manual spec validation passed. The revised task spec is concrete enough to implement: it defines deterministic validation rules, lifecycle gates, persistence, CLI/MCP surfaces, compatibility constraints, ordering, and focused tests. Approving plan before spec freeze.

spec_review_notes: Freezing the manually validated spec as the authoritative prerequisite for implementation. This task must land before verify hardening.

normal_cases.name: Concrete feature spec validates successfully and persists a fresh report
`plan approve` and `spec freeze` proceed when the validation report has no error findings

edge_cases.name: Minimal valid task passes only when every required section, coverage class, and verification mapping is present
Docs-only or design-only task passes only with an explicit scoped waiver
Already frozen legacy task is not retroactively blocked until a validating lifecycle action is invoked

exception_cases.name: Generated placeholder spec fails with actionable finding codes
Missing verification mapping fails before plan approval and before spec freeze
Stale validation report blocks freeze or verify until refreshed

verification_methods.target: Concrete feature spec validates successfully and persists a fresh report
plan approve and spec freeze proceed when the validation report has no error findings
Minimal valid task passes only when every required section, coverage class, and verification mapping is present
Docs-only or design-only task passes only with an explicit scoped waiver
Already frozen legacy task is not retroactively blocked until a validating lifecycle action is invoked
Generated placeholder spec fails with actionable finding codes
Missing verification mapping fails before plan approval and before spec freeze
Stale validation report blocks freeze or verify until refreshed
Layer-adding work with design_mode=none fails validation

external_llm.purpose: not needed for this deterministic first slice
external_llm.trigger: future semantic/spec-quality review can be added after deterministic validation exists

design.decision_reason: adds a lifecycle validation layer and shared gate/report contract
design.layer_decision_reason: introduces a spec-validation layer used by planning, freeze, verify, CLI, and MCP

artifacts.boundary_note: Validator is the only owner of spec-validation rules. Planning, audit, CLI, and MCP call the validator and render its report; they should not define competing rule logic.
Validator is the only owner of spec-validation rules. Planning, audit, CLI, and MCP call the validator and render its report; they should not define competing rule logic.

promotion.required_reason: feature tasks are promotable by default
